name: 雨中拖行李離家＋豪車接人
name_en: Leaving in Rain with Luggage / Luxury Car Pickup
description: 女主被趕出家門拖著行李箱在雨中，男二恰好開車經過救她。落魄與被拯救的反差製造了強烈的視覺敘事。
tags: 狼狽離場的視覺衝擊＋男二適時出現的浪漫救贖＋新舊生活的分界線

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: You are never stepping foot in this house again. Good. It's exactly what I want. ... Need a hand. Noah, you look like you need a ride. Thank you.
examples.context: 狼狽離場的視覺衝擊＋男二適時出現的浪漫救贖＋新舊生活的分界線
